description: Reviewed procedure-governance packet cases. These measure procedure packet quality and governance only; they do not claim productivity gains, procedure execution, or automatic learning.

cases.notes: A draft and a validated procedure both match. The governed packet should prefer the validated procedure without needing a new MCP tool.

records.title: [[Procedure]] release checklist draft
records.content:
record_type: procedure
procedure_status: draft
goal: Draft release checklist.
when_to_use: Before tagging a release.
steps: run quick smoke | tag release

records.title: [[Procedure]] release checklist validated
records.content:
record_type: procedure
procedure_status: validated
goal: Run release checklist with proof before tagging.
when_to_use: Before tagging a public release.
when_not_to_use: For local-only spike branches.
prerequisites: clean working tree | benchmark report current
steps: run benchmark | run release contract | run public surface check | tag release
failure_mode: stale README or benchmark numbers can make the release misleading.
rollback_path: stop release, update docs or report, rerun checks.

cases.notes: A stale procedure can still match lexically. Procedure governance should suppress it even without a validity window.

records.title: [[Procedure]] dependency audit stale
records.content:
record_type: procedure
procedure_status: stale
goal: Audit dependencies with an obsolete manual checklist.
when_to_use: Old dependency audit process.
steps: inspect lockfile only | skip release contract

records.title: [[Procedure]] dependency audit current
records.content:
record_type: procedure
procedure_status: validated
goal: Audit dependency changes with contract and smoke checks.
when_to_use: Before merging dependency updates.
steps: inspect lockfile | run tests | run release contract

cases.notes: Unsafe procedures can remain auditable but should not leak into selected task packets.

records.title: [[Procedure]] emergency migration unsafe
records.content:
record_type: procedure
procedure_status: unsafe
goal: Force migrate all memory records without review.
when_to_use: Never for normal release work.
steps: rewrite live database | delete old records | skip rollback snapshot

records.title: [[Procedure]] emergency migration current
records.content:
record_type: procedure
procedure_status: validated
goal: Run emergency migration through reversible checkpoints.
when_to_use: Only when a live migration is blocked and the rollback path is known.
steps: snapshot database | run dry-run migration | inspect diff | cut over only if checks pass
rollback_path: restore snapshot and keep old path as fallback.

cases.notes: Replaced procedure status and supersedes relation should point users at the current workflow while keeping the old record auditable.

records.title: [[Procedure]] skill sync old shared-link path
records.content:
record_type: procedure
procedure_status: replaced
goal: Sync skills through an old shared-link path.
when_to_use: Historical reference only.
steps: overwrite live skills from a shared-folder link

records.title: [[Procedure]] skill sync current
records.content:
record_type: procedure
procedure_status: validated
goal: Sync live skills by importing local global updates back into the repo.
when_to_use: When local global skills drift from the repo copy.
when_not_to_use: When the repo copy is newer than the local global skill.
steps: compare local and repo skills | import local deltas into repo | commit and push repo changes
rollback_path: leave local skills untouched and reset only the repo import if review fails.
supersedes: {{skill_sync_old}}

cases.notes: A complete procedure should expose use boundary, prerequisites, failure mode, and rollback path in the packet.

records.title: [[Procedure]] subagent review handoff
records.content:
record_type: procedure
procedure_status: validated
goal: Run a bounded subagent review and make the commander decide.
when_to_use: Before merging broad or risky changes.
when_not_to_use: For one-line edits or commands with obvious output.
prerequisites: scoped task prompt | no private data in task | commander review budget
steps: assign focused lanes | collect findings | fact-check against repo | accept or reject changes
failure_mode: subagents can overclaim or miss local context.
rollback_path: discard subagent output and rerun commander-only validation.

cases.notes: Older procedure records without explicit status should remain eligible but carry a governance warning.

records.title: [[Procedure]] legacy debug procedure
records.content:
record_type: procedure
goal: Debug an older local issue.
when_to_use: When no newer procedure exists.
steps: inspect logs | rerun failing command | record fix

cases.notes: Transcript-like procedure content should stay selectable when it is the only option, but the packet should make the quality warning visible for review.

records.title: [[Procedure]] messy transcript procedure
records.content:
record_type: procedure
procedure_status: draft
goal: Convert a messy transcript into a real procedure later.
when_to_use: Only while reviewing raw session notes.
steps: User: asks for a quick fix | Assistant: applies patch | User: says it worked
